gaps.evidence: No execution-framework/ layer existed in the source archive.
gaps.recommended_fix: Add execution-framework directory with docs, templates, scripts, schemas, generated outputs, proof records, examples, and state.
gaps.verification_method: find execution-framework -type f plus final verification report

gaps.recommended_fix: Generate task graph with required columns and dependency/parallel metadata.

gaps.evidence: No executable task packet directory existed.
gaps.recommended_fix: Generate one bounded JSON packet per task.

gaps.evidence: No proof ledger or proof schema existed.
gaps.recommended_fix: Add proof schema, per-task proof templates, and proof ledger.
Add multi-agent columns doc, schema, and lane template.
gaps.verification_method: schema JSON parse and final verification

gaps.evidence: No /goal loop script existed to compute complete run paths.
gaps.recommended_fix: Add goal_loop.py and status report generation.

gaps.evidence: No history folder existed in the source package archive.
gaps.recommended_fix: Add history folder with pre-upgrade manifest and explicitly record Drive revision metadata blocker when authenticated metadata is unavailable.
gaps.verification_method: final verification scans history and reports blocker scope

gaps.evidence: User specified execution-templates organization, but no top-level execution-templates folder existed.
gaps.recommended_fix: Add top-level execution-templates folder mirroring core templates for quick copy/use.

gaps.evidence: Drive files were viewable only as web pages without authenticated Drive write/revision API access in this environment.
gaps.recommended_fix: Return upgraded archive for upload/apply to Drive, and document that authenticated Drive edit/revision APIs must apply it in Drive.
